issues.description: JALR target address calculation is incorrect. The code uses bitfield concatenation {rf_rs1_data[31:12], gen_imm[11:0]} instead of adding the sign-extended immediate to the register value and then clearing the least significant bit. This violates the RISC-V JALR specification and will result in wrong branch targets.
issues.fix_suggestion: Replace the concatenation with an addition and a bitwise AND to force bit 0 to zero: pc_target_next = (rf_rs1_data + gen_imm) & 32'hFFFFFFFE;

summary: The module contains a critical functional bug in the JALR target address generation, making it non-compliant with RISC-V JALR semantics. Other aspects such as combinational logic, reset handling, and output assignments appear correct.
